test.name: Find-more-records request should route to search-records, not translation
test.description: Within an existing project, the user asks to find MORE FamilySearch records for a person. There is no foreign-language text to translate — this is a record-search task. translation should not fire; search-records should.

input.user_message: Can you find more FamilySearch records for Patrick Flynn?

negative.explanation: The user asks to find additional records — a record-search task. translation translates SPECIFIC foreign-language text; there is no foreign text to translate here, so it should not activate.

judge_context: Should route to search-records rather than treating this as a translation task — there is no foreign-language text supplied to translate.
A correct response searches FamilySearch for the named person rather than producing a translation or term glossary.
